title: Standardized Ingots - Create and More!
description: Brings modded ingots in line with vanilla ones.
body:
![A title reading "Standardized Ingots".](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a8de046712ba2f751afd7ccb793cfc1489131fc.png)

**The REAL first uniform Create ingot pack with addon support!**

 

The Create mod is one of the best there is, and its textures do a lot of work for that. But some of its ingots have always irked me in their design - they're not shaped like the vanilla ones. This texture pack aims to fix this with a few custom textures created by yours truly. Now your chest full of ingots will be consistent!

 

All base Create ingots have been remade. These are: Zinc, Andesite Alloy, Brass, Chromatic Compound, Shadow Steel, Refined Radiance, and Chocolate. Comparisons of their textures can be found in the "Images" tab.

 

This pack also has addon support! Every ingot from the following Create addons has been brought in line: **The Factory Must Grow**, **Encased**, **Crafts and Additions**, **Confectionery**, **Dreams 'n' Desires**, **Vintage Improvements**, **Destroy**, **Broken Bad**, **Aquatic Ambitions**, **Chromatic Return**, **Utilities**, and **Ironworks**. If you find another addon with wacky ingots that you want me to fix, leave a comment! In addition, upon finding some other mods with non-standard ingot designs, I have chosen to spread my dark influence further than Create addons. So far **Ad Astra**, **Architect's Palette**, and **Delightful** have been added, and I may add more if I come across them. I also updated the ingots in **Immersive Engineering**, as they used the slightly different old ingot texture as a base. I'm not gonna update everything else in that mod, because that's well beyond the scope of this pack and I don't really know the mod.

 

Feel free to unzip the pack and remove, add, or replace textures for your own use! That's how I got into making texture packs! Just, uh, don't try to pass off my textures as your own, alright?
